## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, please check off all the items that apply:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (Kotlin conventions).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests or Robolectric tests that cover my changes.
- [ ] All local tests pass successfully (`./gradlew test`).
- [ ] The app builds cleanly without errors.
- [ ] I have verified that no proprietary dependencies or advertising SDKs have been added.
